sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9040" key="a)ni/ptamai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνίπταμαι</orth>, <sense id="n9040.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀναπέτομαι</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0563.tlg001:22:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.Tyr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">22.6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
